videos.title: 14 Books That I Didn't Expect to Change My life
videos.description:
Earn points on rent with Bilt: https://www.bilt.com/?utm_medium=video&utm_source=agentio&utm_campaign=agentio__test_awareness_prospecting_brand_markmanson-april2026___ #sponsored 

We've all read the self-help books that make us better people, but what about the non-self-help books? Here are 14 incredible books that I took life-changing lessons from and didn't expect to change how I see the world. 

What books changed how you see things without you expecting them to?
